gakuranBeginnerGuide.title: Gakuran Beginner Guide
gakuranBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Start Gakuran from the official Roblox page, join the community, understand the school setting, and choose how to play your first session.

steps.title: Open the Official Game Page
steps.description: Start from the official Roblox experience page for (学乱) Gakuran to launch the game.

steps.title: Install or Launch Roblox
steps.description: Log in to Roblox, press the green Play button on the experience page, and let Roblox Player install or launch from your browser.

steps.title: Join the Official Community
steps.description: Use the Gakuran Roblox community page to follow the game group and keep track of official game-related updates.

steps.title: Check Discord and Trello Before Playing
steps.description: Use Discord for live community updates and Trello for organized game notes, mechanics, and reference material.

steps.title: Understand the Game Direction
steps.description: Gakuran is presented as a school-life experience set in Japan, but its public category also points players toward action and fighting gameplay.

steps.title: Use the Roblox Help Menu In-Game
steps.description: Open Roblox in-experience Help to view current shortcuts, mouse instructions, mobile gestures, and settings available inside the experience.

tips: Explore the school setting first before chasing advanced mechanics.
Read the public Trello notes so you understand the core systems early.
Expect a mix of roleplay energy and player combat in open areas.
Join the community channels to catch new codes and updates quickly.

gakuranControls.title: Gakuran Controls and Keybinds
gakuranControls.subtitle: Use the default Roblox control layer for movement, camera, chat, menus, mobile play, controller play, and in-experience settings.

controls.notes: Use Roblox movement controls while exploring the school setting.

controls.controller: Controller jump button shown by Roblox
controls.notes: Jump availability can depend on the current in-experience state.

controls.keyboard: Hold right mouse button and drag to rotate
controls.mobile: Swipe or drag on the screen
controls.notes: Roblox camera settings include Classic and Follow modes when the experience allows them.

controls.keyboard: Shift when Shift Lock Switch is enabled
controls.controller: Use the camera controls shown in Help
controls.notes: Shift Lock depends on Roblox settings and the experience camera mode.

controls.keyboard: / to open chat, Enter or Return to send
controls.mobile: Tap the chat icon near the top-left
controls.controller: Use Roblox communication controls when available
controls.notes: Experience chat is filtered and depends on Roblox account communication settings.
Voice chat access depends on Roblox account eligibility and experience settings.

controls.keyboard: Open the Roblox menu, then choose Settings or Help
controls.mobile: Tap the Roblox menu icon, then choose Settings or Help
controls.controller: Open the Roblox menu with the controller menu input
controls.notes: The Help menu shows available shortcuts, mouse instructions, and mobile gestures.
Settings include volume, camera, graphics, accessibility, Reduce Motion, and UI Navigation Toggle.

controls.mobile: Use the Roblox hamburger menu or experience controls
controls.controller: Use the Roblox hamburger menu or experience controls

gakuranFightingStyles.title: Gakuran Fighting Styles Tier List
gakuranFightingStyles.subtitle: Compare the current Gakuran fighting styles for pressure, beginner comfort, mobility, and PvP usefulness.

styles.name: Muay Thai
styles.bestFor: Forward pressure, kick-based melee, and fast punishes in crowded school fights.
styles.practice: Drill dash-in attacks, block timing, and short punish windows before forcing long trades.

styles.name: Boxing
styles.bestFor: New players who want readable combos, simple pressure, and consistent close-range trading.
strengths: Easy to practice in basic PvP
styles.practice: Practice light attacks into safe disengage routes instead of charging into every fight.

styles.name: Hakari
styles.bestFor: Players who prefer style expression, surprise factor, and a less standard fighting route.
styles.practice: Learn when to disengage, bait blocks, and avoid copying pure pressure routes from Muay Thai or Boxing.

gakuranFightingStyles.note: Style balance changes over time. Read the live game interface and the Gakuran Trello for the current move sets and unlock status.

gakuranCombatGuide.title: Gakuran Combat Guide
gakuranCombatGuide.subtitle: Learn stance control, spacing, blocking, punishes, combo practice, and survival habits for open school PvP in Gakuran.

faqs.question: Start With Combat Stance
faqs.answer: Enter combat stance before committing to attacks so your movement, blocks, and punishes stay ready.
details: Use combat stance when approaching a fight instead of opening with random swings.
Keep the camera on the opponent and avoid fighting with your back against doorways or corners.
Leave enough space to dash out after a blocked attack.

faqs.question: Use Spacing Before Combos
faqs.answer: Spacing decides whether your combo starts cleanly or you whiff into a bad trade.
details: Dash in only when the opponent has already missed, blocked too early, or moved predictably.
Do not chase forever in straight lines; cut angles around corners, stairs, and school entrances.
Reset after a missed heavy attack instead of swinging again into a punish.

faqs.question: Block, Parry, Then Punish
faqs.answer: Blocking keeps you alive long enough to punish mistakes instead of giving away free knockdowns.
details: Block when the opponent is already in range and likely to start a chain.
Punish after the opponent commits to a whiffed or blocked attack.
Avoid panic blocking from too far away because it gives away your timing.

faqs.question: Practice Short Combos First
faqs.answer: Short, repeatable strings beat long fantasy combos that only work in edited clips.
details: Begin with light attacks, a safe pause, then reposition.
Add heavy attacks only after you can confirm the first hits.
Practice one style at a time: Boxing for punch chains, Muay Thai for pressure, Hakari for timing and style control.

faqs.question: Survive Group Fights
faqs.answer: Social RP and PvP overlap in Gakuran, so treat crowds as danger zones instead of safe hangouts.
details: Do not tunnel one target when multiple players are circling.
Use open space to avoid getting boxed into hallways.
Leave fights early when stamina, position, or camera control turns bad.

gakuranMapGuide.title: Gakuran Map and School RP Guide
gakuranMapGuide.subtitle: Explore the Gakuran school-life setting, key hangout areas, roleplay routes, and where peaceful RP turns into hallway warfare.

areas.name: School Building
areas.description: Use classrooms and hallways for school-life RP, meetups, introductions, and low-pressure exploration.
areas.tip: Start here first if you want to understand the social flow before looking for fights.

areas.name: Hallways and Entrances
areas.description: Watch player movement, learn where groups gather, and avoid standing still near choke points.
areas.tip: Keep an exit behind you because doorways turn into ambush funnels in crowded servers.

areas.name: Basketball Court
areas.description: Use the court for casual hangouts, pickup activity, and meeting other players before roaming.
areas.tip: Good for social players who still want quick access to nearby PvP.

areas.name: Gym / Workout Area
areas.description: Practice movement habits, test spacing, and use the area as a warm-up stop before open fights.
areas.tip: Treat it as a staging point before switching from RP into combat.

areas.name: Music Room
areas.description: Use the room for quieter roleplay, group scenes, and calmer school-life moments.
areas.tip: Best for players who want the slice-of-life side before looking for PvP.

areas.name: Town Streets
areas.description: Roam between school areas, follow groups, and look for public fights or gang movement.
areas.tip: Stay mobile, avoid being surrounded, and do not start a fight without an escape path.

areas.name: Discord Crews and Gang Routes
areas.description: Follow gang activity, server chatter, events, and group coordination from the official Discord.
areas.tip: Join community routes only after learning basic controls and PvP survival.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Gakuran

questions.question: What is Gakuran on Roblox?
questions.answer: Gakuran is a Roblox experience set in a Japanese school-town, blending school-life roleplay with action, battlegrounds, and fighting gameplay.

questions.question: Are there any active Gakuran codes?
questions.answer: No active public Gakuran codes are listed yet. We track the official Roblox page, the Roblox community, and the Gakuran Discord for new codes.

questions.question: Is Gakuran free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Gakuran is free to play on Roblox across PC, mobile, and supported consoles.

questions.question: Does Gakuran have PvP and fighting styles?
questions.answer: Yes. Gakuran features player combat and multiple fighting styles you can learn and switch between during fights.

questions.question: Where can I find official Gakuran updates?
questions.answer: Check the official Gakuran Roblox experience page, the Roblox community page, and the Gakuran Discord for the latest updates and announcements.

questions.question: What platforms support Gakuran?
questions.answer: Gakuran runs on Roblox, so it is available on PC, mobile, and any platform with the Roblox app installed.
